hero.title: Software Model Engineering Lab
hero.subtitle: Advancing software development through automated software engineering and model-driven design
hero.description: At VNU-UET-FIT, we push the boundaries of software engineering with cutting-edge research in model engineering, transformation, and quality assurance.

about.title: About SME Lab
about.description: The Software Model Engineering Lab (SME Lab) is a research group at VNU-UET-FIT focused on advancing automated software engineering grounded in software model engineering.
about.teamInfo: Our team includes 3 Associate Professors and 5 PhD researchers from FIT, along with 12-15 graduate and undergraduate students collaborating on research projects.

modeling.title: Software Modeling
modeling.description: Design of Domain-Specific Languages (DSLs), Domain-Driven Design (DDD) methodologies, requirements models, and formal semantics frameworks based on logic and graph theory.

transformation.title: Model Transformation
transformation.description: Specification and execution techniques, transformation validation, and artifact generation for efficient model-to-code transformations.

qa.title: Software Quality Assurance
qa.description: Automatic test case generation, inter-model consistency checking, and software verification methods including model finding and RBAC constraint checking.

digital_twins.title: AI & Model-Driven Engineering
digital_twins.description: Integrating AI and MDE to construct intelligent digital twins supporting automated monitoring, reasoning, prediction, and fault detection.

llm.title: Large Language Models
llm.description: Combining LLMs with model-driven techniques to automate requirements specification, code generation, and testing.

mas.title: Multi-Agent Systems
mas.description: Agent architecture & reasoning, agent communication & coordination, and multi-agent planning for complex systems.
